text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm shopping at the mall...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Agh! What am I going to do?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I received some gifts a while back, and I want to
return the favor, but I'm stumped on what to get.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hang on! Since you're here, can I ask you for
help?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So... it's not just one person I want to thank... It's
more like a whole crowd!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But obviously they all like different things, so I
can't think of anything that'll suit all of them.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm... They come over to my parents' place often,
so I was thinking it'd be good to get something
they can all share, but...
choice_data_list: They must be close family friends.
They must be close family friends.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
They are! They all look up to my dad, and they've
always shown me a lot of love too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
In fact, they're always sending me gifts and letters
to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Reading those letters always fills me with such
warm and fuzzy feelings!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So it's only fair that I get them something that'll
fill them with the same warm, happy feeling
they've given me!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you already have your answer.
Sounds like you already have your answer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hm... What would make them happy? Ah.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Winning a bunch of races'll be the best
way to pay them back!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! Instead of buying a physical gift for
them, I'll invest in something to help me win my
races!
choice_data_list: Some good quality shoes would work.
A training guide would be good.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Yeah, having good equipment is essential!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! With a new pair of shoes on my feet, I'll
leave the competition in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that's a good point! Studying is the key to
winning!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll buy a book and read it from cover to
cover!
